title: Out of the Chorus
writer: Harry Chandlee, William B. Laub, Coolidge Streeter
actors: Alice Brady, Vernon Steele, Charles K. Gerrard
plot: After dancer Florence Maddis marries Ross Van Beekman, son of an aristocratic New York family, her friends predict that the union will not be successful, but she manages to fit into the family circle and has no desire to return to...
